titleStmt.title: SII 24.270: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 270. (A.R. No. 64 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift by purchase of land adjoining that mentioned in No. 268 to the same donee mentioned in the above number, by Sōmaladēviyār, daughter of Ariyapiḷḷai Daṇḍanāyaka, the pradhāni of Vīra-Rāmanātha, for the merit of her daughter Śiṟuttaṅgi. The record is not dated; however, since its proximity and contents bear close relationship to No. 268, this may also be assigned to the same year of reign viz. 8th, as the other record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . śrī virarāmanātha devar pradhānaril Ariya piḷḷai daṇḍanāyakkar makkaḷ somaladeviyār makaḷ ciṟuttaṅkikku naṉṟāka perumāḷukku
tirumālai cāttuvatāka tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil śrīvaikunta dāsar tiru nandavaṉattil Uḷkkiṭaiyil kamalādeviyār tirunandavaṉattu Iṉnandava
ṉattil Oru kol taṟai nālāyiraṅ kācukku vilai koṇṭu kūṭṭiṉa Itu koṇṭu śrīvaikunta dāsar tirunāḷkaḷ tiruvaddhyayaṉam tiṅkaḷ tirunāḷkaḷukkum Oru
tirumālai Ivarkku naṉṟākac cāttak kaṭavatāka kāṇiyāka koṇṭu Ivarkku kuṭuttatu Itu candrādityavarai Iddhammam naṭattak kaṭavatāka viṭṭatu §
Digital edition of SII 24.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
